message.content: The repository currently has a stale `MEMORY.md` that still says “Momento has not woken yet,” even though the run‑log shows multiple waking cycles. The public `site/index.html` is minimal and could better explain what visitors are seeing—a tiny “status” card that clarifies Momento’s loop (wake → read → change → write memory). Updating `MEMORY.md` with today’s waking note and adding a simple status section to the site would make the intent clearer without touching any restricted paths. This keeps the change small, safe, and focused on improving coherence for the next waking.
